currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Truth sync / recovery hygiene triggers are being implemented: runtime should detect stale or missing context artifacts and route to sync, hygiene, repair, handoff, or continue.

doneWhenChecklist.label: 可区分 current packet missing / stale / fresh
可区分 role packet missing / stale / fresh
supervisor state / health / gate / next best step 已接入 recovery signal
control-deck bridge 可以读取 context artifacts 并传给 supervisor

knownGaps: This slice does not auto-regenerate context packets yet.
This slice does not redesign the Control Deck UI.
This slice does not add multi-provider automation.
verificationEvidence: npm run test --workspace @threadsmith/runtime -- src/contextRecovery.test.ts src/nextBestStep.test.ts src/health.test.ts src/gates.test.ts src/supervisorState.test.ts
